title: Naam Shabana
desc: Shabhana, desperate for justice, agrees to join a secret intelligence agency in exchange for their help in unmasking her friend's murderer.

title: Janhit Mein Jaari
desc: With the will to break taboo as her armour of choice, Mannu embarks to work as a condom salesperson, despite the reservations of her family and society.

title: Omerta
desc: Ahmed Omar Saeed Sheikh, a British terrorist of Pakistani descent, plots the kidnapping and murder of Wall Street Journal journalist Daniel Pearl.

title: No Entry
desc: A gorgeous club dancer's ill-timed rendezvous opens up a Pandora's box of lies, absurdities and misunderstandings in the lives of three quirky couples.

title: No Entry
desc: A gorgeous club dancer's ill-timed rendezvous opens up a Pandora's box of lies, absurdities and misunderstandings in the lives of three quirky couples.

title: Spyder
desc: Shiva, an intelligence officer, develops a phone software that helps him track those in need of help. He sets out to save the people of Hyderabad when he realises that a serial killer is on the loose.

title: Spyder
desc: Shiva, an intelligence officer, develops a phone software that helps him track those in need of help. He sets out to save the people of Hyderabad when he realises that a serial killer is on the loose.

title: Indian
desc: Police officer Raj Azad arrests terrorist Wasim Khan and prepares to interrogate him. However, his father-in-law mysteriously dies, after which he is blamed for his death and goes on the run.

title: Auron Mein Kahan Dum Tha
desc: As Krishna, an incarcerated man, faces early release, his love story with Vasudha from more than twenty years ago unfurls.

title: Shiva The Super Hero 3
desc: A group of three young friends decides to invest in a resort. However, things become complicated when they realise that it is haunted and take help of a mentalist to track down the ghost.

title: Shiva The Super Hero 3
desc: Three friends decide to invest in a resort and run a business. When they learn that a series of paranormal activities take place, they seek help from a renowned mentalist.

title: Ramaiya Vastavaiya
desc: A man is challenged to work in a field and produce a huge harvest by the end of the season in order to marry the love of his life.

title: Krack
desc: When three notorious criminals lock horns with a hot-tempered police officer, Potharaju Shankar, little do they know that they will end up behind bars.

title: Fitoor
desc: Noor, a Kashmiri boy from a poor family, is hired as a stable keeper by a begum. Later, when he begins to fall in love with Firdaus, the begum's daughter, she separates them by sending her away.

title: Zid
desc: Maya falls in love with Ronnie, a crime reporter, and gets obsessed with him. Things take a turn for the worse when they both get involved in a murder case.

title: Tenali Ramakrishna BA.BL
desc: A money-driven lawyer takes on cases based on their profitability. However, he has a change of heart when he is assigned a criminal case and decides to fight for justice.

title: Mr. Zoo Keeper
desc: A zookeeper dedicated to taking care of wild animals finds himself in a difficult situation with law enforcement officials.

title: Crew
desc: Three ambitious female cabin attendants from Mumbai get caught in a web of lies during their pursuit of dreams, leading to an unexpected heist.

title: Gangubai Kathiawadi
desc: A woman is forced to abandon her Bollywood dreams after her boyfriend sells her to a brothel. As time passes, she builds strong connections in the criminal underworld and rises to power.

title: Fukrey 3
desc: The Fukras plan to take over Delhi and run for city elections. However, they have no money, so they take on an international job to make a quick buck, which changes their lives forever.

title: Chakra Ka Rakshak
desc: A police officer and soldier team up and decide to end the cybercriminals that pose a threat to the safety of people on the Internet.
When mobiles start flying from people's hands, Dr Vaseegaran and his robot Nila are asked to help. However, due to Pakshi Rajan having a hand in this, the two have to reinstate Chitti to defeat him.
